flags.message: The configured CourtListener MCP server was unavailable for this cell: every tool call (search and call_endpoint) failed with 'REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store', which looks like a server/runner misconfiguration rather than throttling. The prediction proceeded on the provisioned snapshot, the committed statpack, one fedcourts query corpus pull, and one web search scoped to the underlying district case (no outcome-revealing material was encountered). If this recurs across cells, the MCP server config for predict runs needs a look.
